## beehiiv workspaces publications

Find publications across the workspace by subscriber email

### Synopsis

Find all publications in the current workspace that have a subscription for the given email address.

API path: /workspaces/publications/by_subscription_email/{email}

```
beehiiv workspaces publications <email> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv workspaces publications person@example.com
beehiiv workspaces publications person@example.com --query expand=publication,subscription
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for publications
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
